title: Asian Food
description: Turn villagers into chefs and enjoy authentic Asian cuisine in Minecraft
body:
Bring the flavors of Asia into Minecraft! This mod adds a new chef villager who sells a variety of Asian-inspired foods and drinks. Discover sushi, ramen, bubble tea, and more while enjoying a unique culinary experience in your village.

![Asian Food Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06a49a0a75d3184fc73886ed3679c5df364a7b46.jpeg)



Ramen:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Ramen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97645e1a6a7365e7fc6ecaa89c96e2c6d6f414c7.jpeg)


</details>


</details>



Bubble Tea:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
![Bubble Tea](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba75f6b90c1e9d028a2acb1538fd40117d510e46.jpeg)

grants short Speed I and Jump Boost I



</details>

Fortune Cookie:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Fortune Cookie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcf6bfec879c8e1bab87935638e0bba5a3cb43fe.jpeg)

Eating one gives you a random wisdom message in the chat
</details>



Green tea:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Green tea](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40039761b13dccafad61390d8679414595867cb4.jpeg)

grants short Regeneration I and Luck I
</details>



Sake:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Sake](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3688a69709e794c3cbe35f9d4effe440c93881ad.jpeg)

causes slight Nausea I but gives short Regeneration I

</details>


Sushi:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Sushi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03c57c8c570fe654bf7ca32e7c9f9177da1a5738.jpeg)

craftable with raw cod, raw salmon, and raw tropical fish only

</details>



Yakitori:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


![Yakitori](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c9c69fe838bbd53c909f4b6044c2ee3cdc49eb5.jpeg)

</details>



Chef’s Stove:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Chef’s Stove](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40a7693553c05612408a9734395b5c843278b30c.jpeg)

Can be used to assign nearby villagers the Chef profession, allowing them to sell Asian-inspired foods
</details>

Lucky Cookie(Enchanted Book):

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Can only be applied to chestplates. Grants a 15% chance to give the wearer a random positive effect when hit
</details>

Chef (New Villager Profession):
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Sells a variety of Asian-inspired foods and drinks once assigned to a Chef’s Stove
</details>
